name: Marcus Lee
summary: Junior DevOps engineer with 2 years automating infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Passionate about platform engineering and developer productivity. Solid Linux background and growing Kubernetes experience.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Automated deployment pipelines reducing release time from 4 hours to 20 minutes

Set up monitoring stack (Prometheus + Grafana) with alerting for 99.9% uptime SLA
